message.content:
Thoroughly explore the boss-assistant project at /Users/zhouboli/Documents/boss-assistant. I need a comprehensive understanding of:

1. Project structure (all directories and key files)
2. Core modules and their responsibilities
3. Infrastructure/utilities available
4. Browser automation patterns
5. Web layer (if any)
6. Database layer (if any)
7. Config management
8. Testing setup
9. CLI structure
10. What's missing compared to a mature browser automation project

Read key files to understand implementation details. I want to know what's already built and what gaps exist.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the boss-assistant project. Let me start with a broad overview and then dive into the details.

1→.PHONY: help install test lint format typecheck ci dev web cli db clean
     2→
     3→help: ## Show this help
     4→	@grep -E '^[a-zA-Z_-]+:.*?## .*$$' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | awk 'BEGIN {FS = ":.*?## "}; {printf "\033[36m%-15s\033[0m %s\n", $$1, $$2}'
     5→
     6→# ── Setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────
     7→
     8→install: ## Install dependencies
     9→	pip3 install -r requirements.txt
    10→	patchright install chrome
    11→
    12→db: ## Initialize database

    14→
    15→# ── Quality ────────────────────────────────────────────
    16→
    17→test: ## Run tests
    18→	python3 -m pytest --tb=short -q
    19→
    20→test-v: ## Run tests (verbose)

    22→
    23→test-cov: ## Run tests with coverage
    24→	python3 -m pytest --cov=src --cov-report=term-missing
    25→
    26→lint: ## Run linter (ruff)
    27→	ruff check src/ tests/
    28→
    29→format: ## Format code (black + ruff fix)
    30→	black src/ tests/
    31→	ruff check --fix src/ tests/
    32→
    33→typecheck: ## Run type checker (mypy)
    34→	mypy src/
    35→
    36→ci: ## Run full CI pip3eline (format check + lint + typecheck + test)
    37→	black --check src/ tests/
    38→	ruff check src/ tests/
    39→	mypy src/
    40→	python3 -m pytest --tb=short -q
    41→
    42→# ── Run ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    43→
    44→dev: ## Start web server (dev mode)

    46→

    48→
    49→cli: ## Show CLI help
    50→	python3 -m src.cli.main --help
    51→
    52→search: ## Quick search (usage: make search K="前端" P=2)
    53→	python3 -m src.cli.main search -k "$(K)" -p $(or $(P),2)
    54→
    55→pip3eline: ## Run pip3eline (usage: make pip3eline K="前端" T=greeting P=2)
    56→	python3 -m src.cli.main pip3eline -k "$(K)" -t $(or $(T),greeting) -p $(or $(P),2)
    57→
    58→# ── Tools ──────────────────────────────────────────────

    65→		--remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-profile-boss &

    73→	find . -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true

1→# Boss Assistant - Claude Code Guidance
     2→
     3→## Project Overview
     4→Boss直聘半自动招聘助手 - Semi-automated recruitment assistant for Boss直聘 (zhipin.com).
     5→Recruiter-side (Boss端) tool for searching candidates, extracting profiles, and sending templated messages.
     6→
     7→## Tech Stack
     8→- Python 3.10+
     9→- Browser automation: Patchright (Playwright fork) + Chrome CDP
    10→- Anti-detection: Emunium (human-like interactions)
    11→- CLI: Click + Rich
    12→- Web: FastAPI + Jinja2 + HTMX + Simple.css
    13→- Real-time: SSE (Server-Sent Events) via sse-starlette
    14→- Database: SQLAlchemy + SQLite (NullPool for concurrent access)
    15→- Rate limiting: Database-backed with adaptive throttling
    16→
    17→## Project Structure
    18→- `src/cli/main.py` - Click CLI with 10 commands (boss login/search/profile/message/pipeline/export/templates/status/logout)
    19→- `src/web/app.py` - FastAPI app factory + lifespan (Chrome auto-start, DB init)
    20→- `src/web/routes/` - Web routes: dashboard, auth, search, candidates, messages, pipeline, export, templates, settings, status
    21→- `src/web/templates/` - Jinja2 templates (base layout + page templates + HTMX partials)
    22→- `src/web/static/` - CSS (style.css) + JS (app.js)
    23→- `src/web/services/chrome_manager.py` - Chrome process lifecycle (auto-start, health check, restart)
    24→- `src/web/services/task_manager.py` - Background pipeline task management with SSE progress
    25→- `src/core/` - Browser manager (CDP singleton), session encryption, anti-detection
    26→- `src/modules/` - Feature modules: auth, search, profile, message, export
    27→- `src/services/pipeline.py` - Search → score → message orchestration (with progress_callback for Web SSE)
    28→- `src/models/database.py` - SQLAlchemy ORM (Candidate, Message, SearchHistory, ActionLog, PipelineRun)
    29→- `src/utils/` - Config, rate limiter, delays, retry, validators, captcha, checkpoint, scoring, logger
    30→- `src/exceptions/errors.py` - Custom exception hierarchy
    31→- `config/` - settings.json, selectors.json, message_templates.json
    32→- `tests/` - Pytest unit tests
    33→- `run_web.py` - Web service entry point
    34→
    35→## Key Patterns
    36→- Singleton pattern for BrowserManager, Config, RateLimiter, SessionManager
    37→- `page.evaluate()` JS extraction for DOM parsing (not CSS selectors)
    38→- Log-normal delays with fatigue/distraction simulation
    39→- Database-backed rate limiting with adaptive throttling on captcha detection
    40→- Checkpoint-based pipeline resume
    41→- Candidate IDs: `zp_{encryptGeekId}` format
    42→
    43→## Running
    44→
    45→### Web Service (recommended)
    46→```bash
    47→# Start web service (auto-launches Chrome)
    48→python run_web.py
    49→
    50→# Or with custom host/port
    51→python run_web.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080
    52→
    53→# Access: http://localhost:8080
    54→```
    55→
    56→### CLI (still supported)
    57→```bash
    58→# Start Chrome with CDP manually
    59→/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222
    60→
    61→# Run commands
    62→python -m src.cli.main login
    63→python -m src.cli.main search -k "前端工程师" -p 2
    64→python -m src.cli.main pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting --dry-run
    65→```
    66→
    67→## Testing
    68→```bash
    69→pytest tests/ -v
    70→```
    71→
    72→## Important Notes
    73→- Web mode: Chrome auto-launched in headed mode with `--user-data-dir` for session persistence
    74→- CLI mode: user manages Chrome lifecycle and logs in manually
    75→- Pipeline runs exclusively lock the browser — other operations (search, message) disabled during pipeline
    76→- Boss直聘 has stricter anti-crawling than Maimai - use conservative rate limits
    77→- Candidate IDs use encrypted format (encryptGeekId), stored as `zp_{id}`
    78→- Search pages: recommend (`/web/boss/recommend`) and active search (`/web/boss/search/geek`)
    79→- Selectors in config/selectors.json are placeholders - fill with real values from Phase 0 recording
    80→
    81→## Skills
    82→- `review`（全局 skill）：带记忆的代码审查。当用户要求分析工程缺陷、代码审查、优化空间时，使用 `/review` 触发。审查历史记录保存在 `.claude/review-history.md`
    83→

1→# Boss Assistant
     2→
     3→Boss直聘半自动招聘助手 —— 面向招聘方（Boss端）的效率工具。
     4→
     5→通过浏览器自动化搜索候选人、提取 Profile、批量发送模板消息，支持 Web 可视化界面和 CLI 两种操作方式。
     6→
     7→## 功能
     8→
     9→- **候选人搜索** — 多关键词搜索、自动翻页（无限滚动）、去重
    10→- **Profile 提取** — 从 Boss直聘页面提取候选人详细信息（教育、工作经历、技能）
    11→- **智能评分** — 基于 JD 的多维度打分（资历、公司、学历、技能匹配），可选 LLM 辅助评分
    12→- **模板消息** — 变量替换、预览、单发/批量发送
    13→- **Pipeline 自动化** — 搜索 → 评分 → 发消息一键流水线，支持断点续传
    14→- **Web 可视化** — 浏览器操作界面，SSE 实时进度，Pipeline 控制面板
    15→- **安全防护** — 自适应限速、验证码检测暂停、拟人化延迟
    16→
    17→## 技术栈
    18→
    19→| 层级 | 技术 |
    20→|------|------|
    21→| Web 服务 | FastAPI + Jinja2 + HTMX + Simple.css |
    22→| 实时通信 | SSE (Server-Sent Events) |
    23→| CLI | Click + Rich |
    24→| 浏览器自动化 | Patchright (Playwright fork) + Chrome CDP |
    25→| 反检测 | Emunium（拟人交互）+ 对数正态延迟 |
    26→| 数据库 | SQLAlchemy + SQLite |
    27→| 评分 | 规则引擎 + Ollama LLM（可选） |
    28→
    29→## 安装
    30→
    31→### 前置要求
    32→
    33→- Python 3.9+
    34→- Google Chrome 浏览器
    35→
    36→### 步骤
    37→
    38→```bash
    39→# 克隆项目
    40→git clone https://github.com/borischou/boss-assistant.git
    41→cd boss-assistant
    42→
    43→# 创建虚拟环境（推荐）
    44→python -m venv venv
    45→source venv/bin/activate  # macOS/Linux
    46→# venv\Scripts\activate   # Windows
    47→
    48→# 安装依赖
    49→pip install -r requirements.txt
    50→```
    51→
    52→## 快速开始
    53→
    54→### Web 模式（推荐）
    55→
    56→```bash
    57→python run_web.py
    58→```
    59→
    60→打开浏览器访问 `http://localhost:8080`。
    61→
    62→Web 服务会自动启动 Chrome（headed 模式），登录态通过 `--user-data-dir` 持久化，首次使用需要在弹出的 Chrome 窗口中手动登录 Boss直聘。
    63→
    64→```bash
    65→# 自定义端口
    66→python run_web.py --port 9000
    67→
    68→# 开发模式（热重载）
    69→python run_web.py --reload
    70→```
    71→
    72→### CLI 模式
    73→
    74→CLI 需要先手动启动 Chrome：
    75→
    76→```bash
    77→# 1. 启动 Chrome（保持终端打开）
    78→/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222
    79→
    80→# 2. 在 Chrome 中登录 Boss直聘
    81→
    82→# 3. 执行命令
    83→python -m src.cli.main login          # 检查登录状态
    84→python -m src.cli.main search -k "前端工程师" -p 3
    85→python -m src.cli.main pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting --dry-run
    86→```
    87→
    88→## Web 界面说明
    89→
    90→| 页面 | 路径 | 说明 |
    91→|------|------|------|
    92→| Dashboard | `/` | 系统状态总览、今日统计、快捷入口 |
    93→| 搜索 | `/search` | 搜索表单，HTMX 局部更新结果 |
    94→| 候选人 | `/candidates` | 列表 + 筛选 + 分页 |
    95→| 候选人详情 | `/candidates/{id}` | Profile 详情、消息记录、发消息 |
    96→| Pipeline | `/pipeline` | 启动/取消 Pipeline，SSE 实时进度 |
    97→| 模板 | `/templates` | 消息模板查看和在线编辑 |
    98→| 导出 | `/export` | 导出 Excel/CSV |
    99→| 设置 | `/settings` | 在线编辑 settings.json |
   100→| 状态 | `/status` | Rate Limit 配额仪表盘 |
   101→
   102→### Pipeline 运行说明
   103→
   104→Pipeline 运行期间浏览器被独占（因为只有一个 Chrome 实例），搜索和发消息按钮会自动禁用。Pipeline 页面通过 SSE 实时展示进度：
   105→
   106→1. **搜索阶段** — 按关键词搜索，翻页加载
   107→2. **评分阶段** — 多维度打分排序
   108→3. **发送阶段** — 逐一发送消息，跳过已发送
   109→4. **验证码** — 检测到验证码时推送通知，在 Chrome 窗口手动处理即可
   110→
   111→## CLI 命令参考
   112→
   113→```
   114→boss-assistant CLI
   115→
   116→Commands:
   117→  login      检查登录状态，未登录则等待手动登录
   118→  search     搜索候选人
   119→  profile    提取候选人详细 Profile
   120→  message    发送模板消息
   121→  pipeline   搜索→评分→发消息 一键流水线
   122→  export     导出候选人数据（Excel/CSV）
   123→  templates  查看消息模板列表
   124→  status     查看 Rate Limit 配额
   125→  logout     清除保存的 Session
   126→```
   127→
   128→### 常用示例
   129→
   130→```bash
   131→# 搜索 — 多关键词，3轮滚动
   132→python -m src.cli.main search -k "前端" -k "React" -p 3
   133→
   134→# 搜索 — 指定城市和学历
   135→python -m src.cli.main search -k "前端工程师" -l "北京" --education "本科"
   136→
   137→# Pipeline — dry run（仅模拟不发送）
   138→python -m src.cli.main pipeline -k "前端" -k "React" -t greeting --dry-run
   139→
   140→# Pipeline — 非交互模式，每2页发送一批
   141→python -m src.cli.main pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting --no-interactive --batch-pages 2
   142→
   143→# Pipeline — 断点续传
   144→python -m src.cli.main pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting --resume
   145→
   146→# 发送单条消息
   147→python -m src.cli.main message zp_abc123 -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=周博立" -v "salary_range=30-50K"
   148→
   149→# 导出
   150→python -m src.cli.main export -f excel -o candidates.xlsx
   151→```
   152→
   153→## 配置
   154→
   155→### config/settings.json
   156→
   157→```jsonc
   158→{
   159→  "browser": {
   160→    "cdp_endpoint": "http://127.0.0.1:9222",  // Chrome CDP 地址
   161→    "timeout": 30000                             // 页面超时（ms）
   162→  },
   163→  "rate_limits": {
   164→    "search_per_hour": 15,        // 每小时搜索次数
   165→    "search_per_day": 80,         // 每日搜索次数
   166→    "message_per_hour": 20,       // 每小时发消息次数
   167→    "message_per_day": 80,        // 每日发消息次数
   168→    "min_interval_seconds": 35    // 最小操作间隔（秒）
   169→  },
   170→  "web": {
   171→    "host": "0.0.0.0",
   172→    "port": 8080,
   173→    "chrome_auto_launch": true,           // 自动启动 Chrome
   174→    "chrome_user_data_dir": "data/.chrome-profile",  // Chrome 用户数据目录
   175→    "chrome_debug_port": 9222
   176→  },
   177→  "scoring": {
   178→    "jd": {
   179→      "title": "前端工程师",
   180→      "required_skills": ["JavaScript", "TypeScript", "React", "Vue"],
   181→      "min_experience_years": 3
   182→    }
   183→  }
   184→}
   185→```
   186→
   187→### config/message_templates.json
   188→
   189→消息模板支持 `{variable}` 变量替换。内置模板：
   190→
   191→| 模板名 | 说明 | 变量 |
   192→|--------|------|------|
   193→| `greeting` | 初次问候 | name, recruiter_name, company, position, target_position, salary_range |
   194→| `follow_up` | 跟进消息 | name, target_position |
   195→| `simple_hello` | 简单问候 | 无 |
   196→| `hello` | 最简问候 | 无 |
   197→
   198→可通过 Web 界面 `/templates` 页面在线编辑，或直接修改 JSON 文件。
   199→
   200→## 项目结构
   201→
   202→```
   203→boss-assistant/
   204→├── run_web.py                    # Web 服务入口
   205→├── config/
   206→│   ├── settings.json             # 主配置
   207→│   ├── selectors.json            # CSS 选择器
   208→│   └── message_templates.json    # 消息模板
   209→├── src/
   210→│   ├── web/                      # Web 服务层
   211→│   │   ├── app.py                # FastAPI 应用工厂 + lifespan
   212→│   │   ├── routes/               # 路由（10个模块）
   213→│   │   ├── services/
   214→│   │   │   ├── chrome_manager.py # Chrome 进程管理
   215→│   │   │   └── task_manager.py   # Pipeline 后台任务
   216→│   │   ├── templates/            # Jinja2 模板
   217→│   │   └── static/               # CSS + JS
   218→│   ├── cli/main.py               # Click CLI
   219→│   ├── core/
   220→│   │   ├── browser.py            # BrowserManager (CDP 单例)
   221→│   │   ├── session.py            # Session 加密存储
   222→│   │   └── anti_detection.py     # 反检测
   223→│   ├── modules/
   224→│   │   ├── auth.py               # 登录检测
   225→│   │   ├── search.py             # 候选人搜索
   226→│   │   ├── profile.py            # Profile 提取
   227→│   │   ├── message.py            # 消息发送
   228→│   │   └── export.py             # 数据导出
   229→│   ├── services/pipeline.py      # Pipeline 编排
   230→│   ├── models/database.py        # SQLAlchemy ORM
   231→│   ├── utils/                    # 工具模块
   232→│   └── exceptions/errors.py      # 异常层级
   233→├── tests/                        # 单元测试
   234→├── data/                         # 运行时数据（gitignored）
   235→│   ├── boss.db                   # SQLite 数据库
   236→│   ├── .chrome-profile/          # Chrome 用户数据
   237→│   ├── exports/                  # 导出文件
   238→│   └── logs/                     # 日志
   239→└── requirements.txt
   240→```
   241→
   242→## 注意事项
   243→
   244→- **headed 模式必须** — Boss直聘反爬较严，Chrome 必须以可见窗口运行（不支持 headless）
   245→- **手动登录** — 首次使用需在 Chrome 中手动登录 Boss直聘，登录态通过 `--user-data-dir` 持久化
   246→- **验证码** — 触发验证码时工具会自动暂停，在 Chrome 窗口手动完成验证后自动继续
   247→- **限速保护** — 内置自适应限速，检测到验证码或错误会自动收紧频率
   248→- **单浏览器** — 同时只支持一个浏览器操作（Pipeline 运行时其他操作排队）
   249→- **数据安全** — 数据库和 Chrome profile 存储在本地 `data/` 目录，已 gitignore
   250→
   251→## 开发
   252→

   254→# 运行测试
   255→pytest tests/ -v
   256→
   257→# 代码格式化
   258→black src/ tests/
   259→
   260→# Lint
   261→ruff check src/ tests/
   262→```

1→"""Session management for persistent browser sessions.
     2→
     3→Handles saving and loading browser sessions (cookies, localStorage)
     4→to enable resuming without re-login.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import json
     8→import os
     9→import stat
    10→import tempfile
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from cryptography.fernet import Fernet
    16→from patchright.async_api import BrowserContext
    17→from loguru import logger
    18→
    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→
    21→
    22→class SessionManager:
    23→    """Manages browser session persistence."""
    24→
    25→    def __init__(self, session_path: Optional[str] = None):
    26→        if session_path is None:
    27→            config = get_config()
    28→            session_path = config.get('data.session_path', 'data/.session/boss_session.json')
    29→
    30→        self.session_path = Path(session_path)
    31→        self._key_path = self.session_path.parent / '.session_key'
    32→        self._fernet: Optional[Fernet] = None
    33→        self._ensure_session_dir()
    34→
    35→    def _ensure_session_dir(self) -> None:
    36→        """Ensure session directory exists with restrictive permissions."""
    37→        session_dir = self.session_path.parent
    38→        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    39→        try:
    40→            os.chmod(session_dir, stat.S_IRWXU)
    41→        except OSError:
    42→            logger.warning("Could not set restrictive permissions on session directory")
    43→
    44→    def _get_fernet(self) -> Fernet:
    45→        """Get or create Fernet encryption instance."""
    46→        if self._fernet is not None:
    47→            return self._fernet
    48→
    49→        if self._key_path.exists():
    50→            key = self._key_path.read_bytes().strip()
    51→        else:
    52→            key = Fernet.generate_key()
    53→            fd = os.open(str(self._key_path), os.O_WRONLY | os.O_CREAT | os.O_TRUNC, 0o600)
    54→            try:
    55→                os.write(fd, key)
    56→            finally:
    57→                os.close(fd)
    58→
    59→        self._fernet = Fernet(key)
    60→        return self._fernet
    61→
    62→    def _decrypt_session_data(self) -> dict:
    63→        """Decrypt and parse the stored session file."""
    64→        encrypted = self.session_path.read_bytes()
    65→        plaintext = self._get_fernet().decrypt(encrypted)
    66→        return json.loads(plaintext.decode('utf-8'))
    67→
    68→    def _write_secure(self, path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    69→        """Atomically write data to file with owner-only permissions (0600)."""
    70→        tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=str(path.parent), suffix=".tmp")
    71→        try:
    72→            os.write(tmp_fd, data)
    73→            os.close(tmp_fd)
    74→            tmp_fd = -1
    75→            os.chmod(tmp_path, 0o600)
    76→            os.replace(tmp_path, str(path))
    77→        except BaseException:
    78→            if tmp_fd >= 0:
    79→                os.close(tmp_fd)
    80→            try:
    81→                os.unlink(tmp_path)
    82→            except OSError:
    83→                pass
    84→            raise
    85→
    86→    def has_saved_session(self) -> bool:
    87→        return self.session_path.exists()
    88→
    89→    async def save(self, context: BrowserContext) -> None:
    90→        try:
    91→            storage_state = await context.storage_state()
    92→            session_data = {
    93→                'saved_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    94→                'storage_state': storage_state
    95→            }
    96→            plaintext = json.dumps(session_data, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
    97→            encrypted = self._get_fernet().encrypt(plaintext)
    98→            self._write_secure(self.session_path, encrypted)
    99→            logger.info(f"Session saved (encrypted) to {self.session_path}")
   100→        except Exception as e:
   101→            logger.error(f"Failed to save session: {e}")
   102→            raise
   103→
   104→    async def clear(self) -> None:
   105→        """Clear saved session and encryption key."""
   106→        if self.session_path.exists():
   107→            self.session_path.unlink()
   108→            logger.info("Session cleared")
   109→
   110→        state_path = self.session_path.parent / 'storage_state.json'
   111→        if state_path.exists():
   112→            state_path.unlink()
   113→
   114→        if self._key_path.exists():
   115→            self._key_path.unlink()
   116→        self._fernet = None
   117→
   118→    def get_session_info(self) -> Optional[dict]:
   119→        if not self.has_saved_session():
   120→            return None
   121→
   122→        try:
   123→            session_data = self._decrypt_session_data()
   124→            saved_at = session_data.get('saved_at')
   125→            storage_state = session_data.get('storage_state', {})
   126→            cookies = storage_state.get('cookies', [])
   127→
   128→            if saved_at:
   129→                saved_datetime = datetime.fromisoformat(saved_at)
   130→                if saved_datetime.tzinfo is None:
   131→                    saved_datetime = saved_datetime.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   132→                age = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - saved_datetime
   133→                age_str = f"{age.days}d {age.seconds // 3600}h"
   134→            else:
   135→                age_str = "unknown"
   136→
   137→            return {
   138→                'saved_at': saved_at,
   139→                'age': age_str,
   140→                'cookie_count': len(cookies),
   141→            }
   142→        except Exception as e:
   143→            logger.error(f"Failed to get session info: {e}")
   144→            return None
   145→
   146→
   147→# Global session manager instance
   148→_session_manager = None
   149→
   150→
   151→def get_session_manager() -> SessionManager:
   152→    """Get global session manager instance."""
   153→    global _session_manager
   154→    if _session_manager is None:
   155→        _session_manager = SessionManager()
   156→    return _session_manager
   157→

1→"""Anti-detection module for browser automation.
     2→
     3→Implements human-like interaction via Emunium + Patchright:
     4→- Human-like scrolling behavior (chunked, variable speed)
     5→- Human-like clicking via Emunium (natural mouse movement)
     6→- Human-like typing via Emunium (variable keystroke timing)
     7→
     8→Note: Webdriver property hiding and navigator masking are handled
     9→by Patchright automatically in CDP mode.
    10→"""
    11→
    12→import random
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from patchright.async_api import Page
    16→from emunium import EmuniumPlaywright
    17→
    18→from src.exceptions.errors import SelectorNotFoundError
    19→
    20→
    21→async def human_scroll(page: Page, direction: str = 'down', distance: Optional[int] = None) -> None:
    22→    """
    23→    Perform human-like scrolling with variable speed.
    24→
    25→    Args:
    26→        page: Playwright page instance
    27→        direction: 'up' or 'down'
    28→        distance: Scroll distance in pixels (random if None)
    29→    """
    30→    if direction not in ('up', 'down'):
    31→        raise ValueError(f"Invalid scroll direction: {direction!r}, expected 'up' or 'down'")
    32→
    33→    if distance is None:
    34→        distance = random.randint(200, 600)
    35→
    36→    if direction == 'up':
    37→        distance = -distance
    38→
    39→    # Break scroll into smaller chunks
    40→    chunks = random.randint(3, 8)
    41→    chunk_size = distance // chunks
    42→
    43→    for i in range(chunks):
    44→        actual_chunk = chunk_size + random.randint(-20, 20)
    45→        await page.mouse.wheel(0, actual_chunk)
    46→        delay = random.uniform(0.05, 0.15)
    47→        await page.wait_for_timeout(delay * 1000)
    48→
    49→    await page.wait_for_timeout(random.uniform(0.2, 0.5) * 1000)
    50→
    51→
    52→async def human_click(page: Page, selector: str) -> None:
    53→    """
    54→    Click an element with human-like behavior using Emunium.
    55→
    56→    Args:
    57→        page: Playwright page instance
    58→        selector: CSS selector for element to click
    59→    """
    60→    try:
    61→        element = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=10000)
    62→    except Exception as e:
    63→        if "timeout" in str(type(e).__name__).lower() or "timeout" in str(e).lower():
    64→            raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element not found: {selector}")
    65→        raise
    66→
    67→    if element is None:
    68→        raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element resolved to None: {selector}")
    69→
    70→    emunium = EmuniumPlaywright(page)
    71→    await emunium.click_at(element)
    72→
    73→
    74→async def human_type(page: Page, selector: str, text: str) -> None:
    75→    """
    76→    Type text with human-like timing using Emunium.
    77→
    78→    Args:
    79→        page: Playwright page instance
    80→        selector: CSS selector for input element
    81→        text: Text to type
    82→    """
    83→    try:
    84→        element = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=10000)
    85→    except Exception as e:
    86→        if "timeout" in str(type(e).__name__).lower() or "timeout" in str(e).lower():
    87→            raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element not found: {selector}")
    88→        raise
    89→
    90→    if element is None:
    91→        raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element resolved to None: {selector}")
    92→
    93→    emunium = EmuniumPlaywright(page)
    94→    await emunium.type_at(element, text)
    95→

1→"""Browser manager for Playwright automation.
     2→
     3→Provides a singleton browser manager that connects to an existing Chrome
     4→instance via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol). Supports multi-tab management
     5→for workflows that open new tabs.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import asyncio
     9→import threading
    10→from pathlib import Path
    11→from typing import List, Optional
    12→from datetime import datetime
    13→
    14→from patchright.async_api import async_playwright, Browser, BrowserContext, Page, Playwright
    15→from loguru import logger
    16→
    17→from src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    18→from src.core.session import SessionManager, get_session_manager
    19→from src.exceptions.errors import BrowserError
    20→
    21→
    22→class BrowserManager:
    23→    """
    24→    Singleton browser manager for Boss直聘 automation.
    25→
    26→    Connects to a user-managed Chrome instance via CDP endpoint.
    27→    The user starts Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and logs in
    28→    manually. This manager connects/disconnects without closing Chrome.
    29→    """
    30→
    31→    _instance: Optional['BrowserManager'] = None
    32→    _lock: Optional[asyncio.Lock] = None
    33→    _lock_loop = None
    34→    _init_lock: threading.Lock = threading.Lock()
    35→
    36→    def __new__(cls, **kwargs):
    37→        with cls._init_lock:
    38→            if cls._instance is None:
    39→                cls._instance = super().__new__(cls)
    40→                cls._instance._initialized = False
    41→            return cls._instance
    42→
    43→    def __init__(
    44→        self,
    45→        config: Optional[Config] = None,
    46→        session_manager: Optional[SessionManager] = None,
    47→    ):
    48→        if self._initialized:
    49→            return
    50→
    51→        self._playwright: Optional[Playwright] = None
    52→        self._browser: Optional[Browser] = None
    53→        self._context: Optional[BrowserContext] = None
    54→        self._page: Optional[Page] = None
    55→        self._primary_page: Optional[Page] = None
    56→        self._opened_tabs: List[Page] = []
    57→        self._session_manager: SessionManager = session_manager or get_session_manager()
    58→        self._config: Config = config or get_config()
    59→        self._cdp_endpoint: Optional[str] = None
    60→        self._owned_page: bool = False
    61→        self._initialized = True
    62→
    63→    @property
    64→    def is_running(self) -> bool:
    65→        """Check if browser is currently connected."""
    66→        return self._browser is not None and self._browser.is_connected()
    67→
    68→    @property
    69→    def page(self) -> Optional[Page]:
    70→        """Get current page instance."""
    71→        return self._page
    72→
    73→    @property
    74→    def context(self) -> Optional[BrowserContext]:
    75→        """Get current browser context."""
    76→        return self._context
    77→
    78→    @classmethod
    79→    def _ensure_lock(cls):
    80→        """Lazily create the asyncio.Lock inside a running event loop.
    81→
    82→        Always recreates the lock when called from a different event loop
    83→        than the one that created it. Python 3.10+ removed the _loop
    84→        attribute from asyncio primitives, so we track the loop ourselves.
    85→        """
    86→        try:
    87→            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    88→        except RuntimeError:
    89→            loop = None
    90→        if cls._lock is None or (loop and getattr(cls, '_lock_loop', None) is not loop):
    91→            cls._lock = asyncio.Lock()
    92→            cls._lock_loop = loop
    93→
    94→    @classmethod
    95→    async def reset_instance(cls) -> None:
    96→        """Reset the singleton instance, closing any existing connection.
    97→
    98→        Used by Web service when Chrome process is restarted and a fresh
    99→        connection is needed.
   100→        """
   101→        with cls._init_lock:
   102→            if cls._instance is not None:
   103→                try:
   104→                    await cls._instance._close_internal()
   105→                except Exception:
   106→                    pass
   107→                cls._instance = None
   108→                cls._lock = None
   109→                cls._lock_loop = None
   110→
   111→        global _browser_manager
   112→        _browser_manager = None
   113→
   114→    def set_cdp_endpoint(self, endpoint: str) -> None:
   115→        """Override CDP endpoint (e.g. from CLI --cdp flag)."""
   116→        self._cdp_endpoint = endpoint
   117→
   118→    async def start(self) -> Page:
   119→        """
   120→        Connect to Chrome via CDP and return a page.
   121→
   122→        Returns:
   123→            Configured Playwright page instance
   124→
   125→        Raises:
   126→            BrowserError: If connection fails
   127→        """
   128→        self._ensure_lock()
   129→        async with self._lock:
   130→            if self.is_running:
   131→                logger.debug("Browser already connected, returning existing page")
   132→                return self._page
   133→
   134→            try:
   135→                endpoint = self._cdp_endpoint or self._config.get(
   136→                    'browser.cdp_endpoint', 'http://localhost:9222'
   137→                )
   138→                timeout = self._config.get('browser.timeout', 30000)
   139→
   140→                logger.info(f"Connecting to Chrome via CDP: {endpoint}")
   141→
   142→                self._playwright = await async_playwright().start()
   143→                self._browser = await self._playwright.chromium.connect_over_cdp(endpoint)
   144→
   145→                contexts = self._browser.contexts
   146→                if contexts:
   147→                    self._context = contexts[0]
   148→                else:
   149→                    logger.warning("No existing context found, creating new one")
   150→                    self._context = await self._browser.new_context()
   151→
   152→                self._context.set_default_timeout(timeout)
   153→
   154→                pages = self._context.pages
   155→                if pages:
   156→                    self._page = pages[0]
   157→                    self._owned_page = False
   158→                    logger.info(f"Reusing existing tab: {self._page.url}")
   159→                else:
   160→                    self._page = await self._context.new_page()
   161→                    self._owned_page = True
   162→                    logger.info("Created new tab")
   163→
   164→                self._primary_page = self._page
   165→                self._opened_tabs = []
   166→
   167→                logger.info("Connected to Chrome via CDP successfully")
   168→                return self._page
   169→
   170→            except Exception as e:
   171→                logger.error(f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP: {e}")
   172→                await self._close_internal()
   173→                raise BrowserError(
   174→                    f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP at {endpoint}. "
   175→                    f"Make sure Chrome is running with --remote-debugging-port=9222. "
   176→                    f"Error: {e}"
   177→                )
   178→
   179→    async def close(self) -> None:
   180→        """Disconnect from Chrome via CDP. Does NOT close the user's Chrome."""
   181→        self._ensure_lock()
   182→        async with self._lock:
   183→            await self._close_internal()
   184→
   185→    async def _close_internal(self) -> None:
   186→        """Actual cleanup logic."""
   187→        try:
   188→            for tab in self._opened_tabs:
   189→                try:
   190→                    if not tab.is_closed():
   191→                        await tab.close()
   192→                except Exception as e:
   193→                    logger.debug(f"Error closing tab during cleanup: {e}")
   194→            self._opened_tabs = []
   195→
   196→            if self._page and self._owned_page:
   197→                try:
   198→                    await self._page.close()
   199→                except Exception as e:
   200→                    logger.debug(f"Error closing page during cleanup: {e}")
   201→            self._page = None
   202→            self._primary_page = None
   203→            self._owned_page = False
   204→
   205→            self._context = None
   206→
   207→            if self._browser:
   208→                try:
   209→                    await self._browser.close()
   210→                except Exception as e:
   211→                    logger.error(f"Error closing browser connection: {e}")
   212→                finally:
   213→                    self._browser = None
   214→
   215→            if self._playwright:
   216→                try:
   217→                    await self._playwright.stop()
   218→                except Exception as e:
   219→                    logger.error(f"Error stopping Playwright: {e}")
   220→                finally:
   221→                    self._playwright = None
   222→
   223→            logger.info("Disconnected from Chrome (browser stays open)")
   224→
   225→        except Exception as e:
   226→            logger.error(f"Error disconnecting from Chrome: {e}")
   227→
   228→    async def wait_for_new_tab(self, timeout: int = 10000) -> Page:
   229→        """Wait for a click-triggered new tab, apply stealth, and switch to it."""
   230→        if not self._context:
   231→            raise BrowserError("No active context for wait_for_new_tab")
   232→
   233→        try:
   234→            new_page = await self._context.wait_for_event(
   235→                "page", timeout=timeout
   236→            )
   237→            await new_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
   238→            self._opened_tabs.append(new_page)
   239→            self._page = new_page
   240→            logger.info(f"New tab captured: {new_page.url}")
   241→            return new_page
   242→        except Exception as e:
   243→            raise BrowserError(f"No new tab opened within {timeout}ms: {e}")
   244→
   245→    def switch_to_primary_tab(self) -> Page:
   246→        """Switch back to the original (primary) tab."""
   247→        if not self._primary_page or self._primary_page.is_closed():
   248→            raise BrowserError("Primary tab is not available")
   249→
   250→        self._page = self._primary_page
   251→        logger.debug(f"Switched to primary tab: {self._page.url}")
   252→        return self._page
   253→
   254→    async def close_current_tab(self) -> Page:
   255→        """Close the current active tab and switch to the previous one."""
   256→        if not self._page:
   257→            raise BrowserError("No active page to close")
   258→
   259→        if self._page == self._primary_page:
   260→            raise BrowserError("Cannot close the primary tab")
   261→
   262→        closing = self._page
   263→        try:
   264→            if closing in self._opened_tabs:
   265→                self._opened_tabs.remove(closing)
   266→            await closing.close()
   267→        except Exception as e:
   268→            logger.warning(f"Error closing tab: {e}")
   269→
   270→        if self._context and self._context.pages:
   271→            self._page = self._context.pages[-1]
   272→        else:
   273→            self._page = self._primary_page
   274→
   275→        logger.debug(f"Closed tab, switched to: {self._page.url if self._page else 'none'}")
   276→        return self._page
   277→
   278→    async def save_session(self) -> None:
   279→        """Save current session to disk (backup of cookies)."""
   280→        if self._context:
   281→            await self._session_manager.save(self._context)
   282→        else:
   283→            logger.warning("No active context to save session from")
   284→
   285→    async def screenshot(self, name: str = None) -> str:
   286→        """Take a screenshot of current page."""
   287→        if not self._page:
   288→            raise BrowserError("No active page for screenshot")
   289→
   290→        screenshot_dir = Path(self._config.get('data.screenshot_dir', 'data/screenshots'))
   291→        screenshot_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   292→
   293→        if name is None:
   294→            name = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   295→
   296→        filepath = screenshot_dir / f"{name}.png"
   297→
   298→        await self._page.screenshot(path=str(filepath), full_page=True)
   299→        logger.info(f"Screenshot saved: {filepath}")
   300→
   301→        return str(filepath)
   302→
   303→
   304→# Global browser manager instance
   305→_browser_manager: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
   306→
   307→
   308→def get_browser_manager() -> BrowserManager:
   309→    """Get global browser manager instance."""
   310→    global _browser_manager
   311→    if _browser_manager is None:
   312→        _browser_manager = BrowserManager()
   313→    return _browser_manager
   314→

1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages:
     4→- Search page: /web/chat/search (搜索候选人)
     5→- Job list: /web/chat/job/list (职位管理)
     6→
     7→Uses page.evaluate() for JavaScript-based DOM extraction rather than
     8→CSS selectors for better reliability against page structure changes.
     9→"""
    10→
    11→import hashlib
    12→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    13→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    14→from urllib.parse import urlencode
    15→
    16→from patchright.async_api import Page
    17→from loguru import logger
    18→from rich.console import Console
    19→from rich.table import Table
    20→
    21→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    22→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    23→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    24→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    25→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    26→console = Console()
    27→
    28→
    29→@dataclass
    30→class CandidateBasic:
    31→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    32→    boss_id: str
    33→    name: str
    34→    title: str
    35→    company: str
    36→    location: Optional[str] = None
    37→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    38→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    39→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    40→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    41→    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    42→
    43→    def __hash__(self):
    44→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    45→
    46→    def __eq__(self, other):
    47→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    48→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    49→        return False
    50→
    51→
    52→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    53→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    54→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    55→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    56→}
    57→
    58→
    59→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    60→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    61→    if not title:
    62→        return False
    63→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    64→        if keyword in title:
    65→            return True
    66→    return False
    67→
    68→
    69→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    70→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash.
    71→
    72→    Uses SHA-256 with 20 hex chars to reduce collision probability
    73→    compared to MD5 with 12 chars.
    74→    """
    75→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    76→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    77→    return f"zp_{h}"
    78→
    79→
    80→# JavaScript extraction function for Boss直聘 search results page
    81→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
    82→() => {
    83→    const candidates = [];
    84→
    85→    // Strategy 1: Look for candidate cards in search results
    86→    // Boss直聘 search result cards typically have geek info containers
    87→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll(
    88→        '[class*="card-inner"], [class*="geek-card"], [class*="candidate-card"], ' +
    89→        '[class*="recommend-card"], [class*="job-card-wrap"], [class*="user-item"]'
    90→    );
    91→
    92→    for (const card of cards) {
    93→        try {
    94→            // Extract name
    95→            const nameEl = card.querySelector(
    96→                '[class*="name"], [class*="geek-name"], h3, [class*="username"]'
    97→            );
    98→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    99→
   100→            if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   101→
   102→            // Extract title/position
   103→            const titleEl = card.querySelector(
   104→                '[class*="title"], [class*="position"], [class*="expect-position"], ' +
   105→                '[class*="job-title"]'
   106→            );
   107→            const title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   108→
   109→            // Extract company
   110→            const companyEl = card.querySelector(
   111→                '[class*="company"], [class*="comp-name"]'
   112→            );
   113→            const company = companyEl ? companyEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   114→
   115→            // Extract location
   116→            const locationEl = card.querySelector(
   117→                '[class*="area"], [class*="location"], [class*="city"]'
   118→            );
   119→            const location = locationEl ? locationEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   120→
   121→            // Extract salary expectation
   122→            const salaryEl = card.querySelector(
   123→                '[class*="salary"], [class*="expect-salary"]'
   124→            );
   125→            const salary = salaryEl ? salaryEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   126→
   127→            // Extract work years
   128→            const yearsEl = card.querySelector(
   129→                '[class*="work-year"], [class*="experience"]'
   130→            );
   131→            const workYears = yearsEl ? yearsEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   132→
   133→            // Extract education
   134→            const eduEl = card.querySelector(
   135→                '[class*="education"], [class*="degree"], [class*="edu"]'
   136→            );
   137→            const education = eduEl ? eduEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   138→
   139→            // Try to extract profile URL and encrypted geek ID
   140→            let profileUrl = '';
   141→            let bossId = '';
   142→
   143→            // Check for links in the card
   144→            const link = card.querySelector('a[href*="/web/geek/"], a[href*="geek"], a[href*="resume"]');
   145→            if (link) {
   146→                profileUrl = link.href;
   147→                // Try to extract encryptGeekId from URL
   148→                const match = profileUrl.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   149→                if (match) {
   150→                    bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   151→                }
   152→            }
   153→
   154→            // Fallback: check data attributes
   155→            if (!bossId) {
   156→                const dataId = card.getAttribute('data-geekid') ||
   157→                               card.getAttribute('data-uid') ||
   158→                               card.getAttribute('data-id') ||
   159→                               card.getAttribute('data-encrypt-id');
   160→                if (dataId) {
   161→                    bossId = 'zp_' + dataId;
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→
   165→            // Fallback: check card onclick or inner links for IDs
   166→            if (!bossId) {
   167→                const allLinks = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   168→                for (const a of allLinks) {
   169→                    const href = a.href;
   170→                    const match = href.match(/encryptGeekId=([^&]+)/);
   171→                    if (match) {
   172→                        bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   173→                        if (!profileUrl) profileUrl = href;
   174→                        break;
   175→                    }
   176→                }
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            candidates.push({
   180→                boss_id: bossId,
   181→                name: name,
   182→                title: title,
   183→                company: company,
   184→                location: location,
   185→                salary_expect: salary,
   186→                work_years: workYears,
   187→                education_level: education,
   188→                profile_url: profileUrl
   189→            });
   190→        } catch (e) {
   191→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   192→        }
   193→    }
   194→
   195→    // Strategy 2: If no cards found, try extracting from list items
   196→    if (candidates.length === 0) {
   197→        const listItems = document.querySelectorAll(
   198→            '[class*="geek-list"] > *, [class*="resume-list"] > *, ' +
   199→            '[class*="talent-list"] > *, [class*="recommend-list"] > *'
   200→        );
   201→
   202→        for (const item of listItems) {
   203→            try {
   204→                const text = item.innerText || '';
   205→                const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   206→                if (lines.length < 2) continue;
   207→
   208→                const name = lines[0].trim();
   209→                if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   210→
   211→                const title = lines.length > 1 ? lines[1].trim() : '';
   212→                const company = lines.length > 2 ? lines[2].trim() : '';
   213→
   214→                let bossId = '';
   215→                const link = item.querySelector('a[href]');
   216→                if (link) {
   217→                    const match = link.href.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   218→                    if (match) bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   219→                }
   220→
   221→                candidates.push({
   222→                    boss_id: bossId,
   223→                    name: name,
   224→                    title: title,
   225→                    company: company,
   226→                    location: '',
   227→                    salary_expect: '',
   228→                    work_years: '',
   229→                    education_level: '',
   230→                    profile_url: link ? link.href : ''
   231→                });
   232→            } catch (e) {
   233→                continue;
   234→            }
   235→        }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    return candidates;
   239→}
   240→"""
   241→
   242→
   243→async def search_candidates(
   244→    keywords: List[str],
   245→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   246→    max_pages: int = 1,
   247→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   248→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   249→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   250→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   251→    start_page: int = 1,
   252→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   253→    """
   254→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   255→
   256→    Supports multi-keyword search with deduplication.
   257→
   258→    Args:
   259→        keywords: List of search keywords
   260→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   261→        max_pages: Maximum number of pages to scrape per keyword
   262→        experience: Experience filter (e.g., "3-5年")
   263→        education: Education filter (e.g., "本科")
   264→        salary: Salary filter (e.g., "20-40K")
   265→        browser: Browser manager instance
   266→
   267→    Returns:
   268→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   269→    """
   270→    if browser is None:
   271→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   272→
   273→    page = browser.page
   274→    if not page:
   275→        page = await browser.start()
   276→
   277→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   278→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   279→
   280→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   281→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   282→    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   283→
   284→    for keyword in keywords:
   285→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   286→
   287→        # Rate limit check
   288→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   289→
   290→        try:
   291→            # Navigate to search page
   292→            search_url = _build_search_url(keyword, location, experience, education, salary)
   293→            await page.goto(search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   294→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   295→
   296→            # Check for captcha
   297→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   298→
   299→            # Check for quota exhaustion page
   300→            if await _check_quota_exhausted(page):
   301→                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   302→                break
   303→
   304→            # Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll (auto-load on scroll), no pagination buttons.
   305→            # Scroll multiple rounds to load more candidates.
   306→            # start_page allows resuming from a previous scroll position.
   307→            total_rounds = start_page + max_pages - 1
   308→            for scroll_round in range(start_page, total_rounds + 1):
   309→                console.print(f"  [dim]Scroll round {scroll_round}/{total_rounds}...[/dim]")
   310→
   311→                # Scroll within the content container to trigger auto-load.
   312→                # The page uses an inner scrollable container, not window scroll.
   313→                await _scroll_search_results(page)
   314→                await async_random_delay('scroll')
   315→
   316→            # Extract candidates via JavaScript after all scrolling is done
   317→            raw_candidates = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   318→
   319→            if not raw_candidates:
   320→                logger.warning(f"No candidates found for '{keyword}'")
   321→                continue
   322→
   323→            # Process results
   324→            page_count = 0
   325→            for raw in raw_candidates:
   326→                name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   327→                title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   328→                company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   329→
   330→                if not name:
   331→                    continue
   332→
   333→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   334→                if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   335→                    continue
   336→
   337→                # Generate or use boss_id
   338→                boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   339→                if not boss_id:
   340→                    boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   341→
   342→                # Deduplicate
   343→                if boss_id in seen_ids:
   344→                    continue
   345→
   346→                # Also check name+company dedup
   347→                dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   348→                if dedup_key in seen_dedup_keys:
   349→                    continue
   350→
   351→                seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   352→                seen_dedup_keys.add(dedup_key)
   353→
   354→                candidate = CandidateBasic(
   355→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   356→                    name=name,
   357→                    title=title,
   358→                    company=company,
   359→                    location=raw.get('location', ''),
   360→                    salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   361→                    work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   362→                    education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   363→                    profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   364→                )
   365→
   366→                all_candidates.append(candidate)
   367→                page_count += 1
   368→
   369→            # Log action
   370→            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   371→                'keyword': keyword,
   372→                'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   373→                'results': page_count,
   374→            })
   375→
   376→            console.print(f"  [green]Found {page_count} candidates for '{keyword}'[/green]")
   377→
   378→            # Save search history
   379→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   380→                history = SearchHistory(
   381→                    criteria={
   382→                        'keywords': keyword,
   383→                        'location': location,
   384→                        'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   385→                        'experience': experience,
   386→                        'education': education,
   387→                        'salary': salary,
   388→                    },
   389→                    results_count=page_count,
   390→                )
   391→                session.add(history)
   392→
   393→        except Exception as e:
   394→            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   395→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   396→            rate_limiter.report_error()
   397→
   398→    # Save candidates to database
   399→    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   400→
   401→    # Display results summary
   402→    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   403→
   404→    return all_candidates
   405→
   406→
   407→def _build_search_url(
   408→    keyword: str,
   409→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   410→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   411→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   412→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   413→) -> str:
   414→    """Build Boss直聘 search URL with query parameters.
   415→
   416→    Note: Boss直聘 search uses infinite scroll, not URL-based pagination.
   417→    """
   418→    base_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   419→
   420→    params = {"query": keyword}
   421→
   422→    if location:
   423→        params["city"] = location
   424→
   425→    if experience:
   426→        params["experience"] = experience
   427→
   428→    if education:
   429→        params["degree"] = education
   430→
   431→    if salary:
   432→        params["salary"] = salary
   433→
   434→    url = f"{base_url}?{urlencode(params)}"
   435→    return url
   436→
   437→
   438→async def _scroll_search_results(page: Page) -> None:
   439→    """
   440→    Scroll the search results container to trigger auto-load.
   441→
   442→    Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll within an inner container,
   443→    not window-level scroll. We scroll the container or fall back
   444→    to keyboard-based scrolling.
   445→    """
   446→    # Try scrolling within the candidate list container
   447→    scrolled = await page.evaluate("""
   448→        () => {
   449→            // Find the scrollable container for search results
   450→            const containers = document.querySelectorAll(
   451→                '[class*="recommend-list"], [class*="geek-list"], [class*="search-result"],
   452→                 [class*="candidate-list"], [class*="card-list"], [class*="scroll-container"]'
   453→            );
   454→            for (const c of containers) {
   455→                if (c.scrollHeight > c.clientHeight) {
   456→                    c.scrollTop += 600;
   457→                    return true;
   458→                }
   459→            }
   460→
   461→            // Fallback: find any large scrollable div
   462→            const allDivs = document.querySelectorAll('div');
   463→            for (const d of allDivs) {
   464→                if (d.scrollHeight > d.clientHeight + 100 && d.clientHeight > 300) {
   465→                    d.scrollTop += 600;
   466→                    return true;
   467→                }
   468→            }
   469→
   470→            return false;
   471→        }
   472→    """)
   473→
   474→    if not scrolled:
   475→        # Final fallback: use keyboard Page Down
   476→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   477→        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   478→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   479→
   480→    # Wait for new content to load
   481→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   482→
   483→
   484→async def _check_quota_exhausted(page: Page) -> bool:
   485→    """Check if Boss直聘 shows a quota exhaustion page."""
   486→    try:
   487→        result = await page.evaluate("""
   488→            () => {
   489→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   490→                const quotaIndicators = [
   491→                    '今日沟通次数已用完',
   492→                    '沟通次数已达上限',
   493→                    '今日联系人数已满',
   494→                    '升级会员',
   495→                    '开通会员享更多沟通'
   496→                ];
   497→                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   498→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   499→                        return true;
   500→                    }
   501→                }
   502→                return false;
   503→            }
   504→        """)
   505→        return result
   506→    except Exception:
   507→        return False
   508→
   509→
   510→def _save_candidates_to_db(
   511→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   512→    keywords: List[str],
   513→    db_manager,
   514→) -> None:
   515→    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   516→    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   517→
   518→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   519→        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   520→        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   521→        existing_map = {}
   522→        # Query in chunks of 500 to avoid SQLite variable limit
   523→        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   524→            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   525→            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   526→                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   527→            ).all()
   528→            for row in rows:
   529→                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   530→
   531→        for c in candidates:
   532→            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   533→            if existing:
   534→                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   535→                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   536→                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   537→                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   538→                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   539→                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   540→                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   541→                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   542→                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   543→                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   544→            else:
   545→                new_candidate = Candidate(
   546→                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   547→                    name=c.name,
   548→                    title=c.title,
   549→                    company=c.company,
   550→                    location=c.location,
   551→                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   552→                    work_years=c.work_years,
   553→                    education_level=c.education_level,
   554→                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   555→                    source_search=source,
   556→                )
   557→                session.add(new_candidate)
   558→
   559→
   560→def _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   561→    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   562→    if not candidates:
   563→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found.[/yellow]")
   564→        return
   565→
   566→    table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   567→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim", max_width=20)
   568→    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   569→    table.add_column("Title")
   570→    table.add_column("Company")
   571→    table.add_column("Location")
   572→    table.add_column("Salary Expect")
   573→    table.add_column("Experience")
   574→    table.add_column("Education")
   575→
   576→    for c in candidates[:50]:  # Show max 50 in table
   577→        table.add_row(
   578→            c.boss_id[:20],
   579→            c.name,
   580→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   581→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   582→            c.location or "",
   583→            c.salary_expect or "",
   584→            c.work_years or "",
   585→            c.education_level or "",
   586→        )
   587→
   588→    console.print(table)
   589→
   590→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   591→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(candidates) - 50} more candidates[/dim]")
   592→

1→"""Authentication module for Boss直聘 login.
     2→
     3→In CDP mode, the user logs in manually in their own Chrome before running
     4→CLI commands. This module verifies login status and provides guidance
     5→if the user is not logged in.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import asyncio
     9→from typing import Optional
    10→
    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→from loguru import logger
    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→from rich.panel import Panel
    15→
    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    18→from src.exceptions.errors import SessionExpiredError
    19→
    20→console = Console()
    21→
    22→
    23→async def login(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
    24→    """
    25→    Verify login status in CDP-connected Chrome.
    26→
    27→    In CDP mode, the user is expected to already be logged in to Boss直聘.
    28→    If not, instructions are printed for manual login in the browser.
    29→
    30→    Args:
    31→        browser: Browser manager instance (uses global if None)
    32→
    33→    Returns:
    34→        True if logged in
    35→    """
    36→    if browser is None:
    37→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    38→
    39→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP
    40→    page = await browser.start()
    41→
    42→    # Check if already logged in
    43→    if await check_login_status(page):
    44→        console.print("[green]Already logged in to Boss直聘![/green]")
    45→        # Save session as backup
    46→        await browser.save_session()
    47→        return True
    48→
    49→    # Not logged in — guide the user
    50→    console.print(Panel(
    51→        "[bold]Not Logged In[/bold]\n\n"
    52→        "Please log in to Boss直聘 in your Chrome browser:\n"
    53→        "1. Go to https://www.zhipin.com/web/user/?ka=header-login in Chrome\n"
    54→        "2. Scan QR code with Boss直聘 app, OR\n"
    55→        "3. Enter phone number and verification code\n\n"
    56→        "[dim]Then wait here, login will be detected automatically.[/dim]",
    57→        title="Boss直聘 Login",
    58→        border_style="cyan"
    59→    ))
    60→
    61→    # Poll for login (user may log in while we wait)
    62→    max_wait_seconds = 300  # 5 minutes timeout
    63→    poll_interval = 3
    64→    elapsed = 0
    65→
    66→    console.print("[dim]Waiting for login... (timeout: 5 minutes)[/dim]")
    67→
    68→    while elapsed < max_wait_seconds:
    69→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
    70→        elapsed += poll_interval
    71→
    72→        # Check for captcha
    73→        await check_captcha(page)
    74→
    75→        if await check_login_status(page):
    76→            console.print("[green]Login successful![/green]")
    77→            await browser.save_session()
    78→            console.print("[green]Session saved as backup[/green]")
    79→            return True
    80→
    81→    console.print("[red]Login timeout. Please log in manually and try again.[/red]")
    82→    return False
    83→
    84→
    85→async def check_login_status(page: Page) -> bool:
    86→    """
    87→    Check if user is currently logged in to Boss直聘 by navigating to a
    88→    protected page and observing whether Boss直聘 redirects to the login page.
    89→
    90→    Args:
    91→        page: Playwright page instance
    92→
    93→    Returns:
    94→        True if logged in (no redirect to login page)
    95→    """
    96→    try:
    97→        # Navigate to a protected page that requires authentication.
    98→        # The Boss search page reliably triggers server-side auth checks.
    99→        protected_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   100→        await page.goto(protected_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   101→
   102→        # Wait for any redirects to settle
   103→        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   104→
   105→        # Check 1: URL-based detection - did we get redirected to login?
   106→        final_url = page.url
   107→        if 'login' in final_url.lower() or 'signin' in final_url.lower():
   108→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=redirected_to_login (url={final_url})")
   109→            return False
   110→
   111→        # Check 2: Page content detection - look for login form elements
   112→        is_login_page = await page.evaluate("""
   113→            () => {
   114→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   115→                const loginIndicators = [
   116→                    '欢迎登录',
   117→                    '扫码登录',
   118→                    '密码登录',
   119→                    '短信登录',
   120→                    '请输入手机号',
   121→                    '获取验证码',
   122→                    '微信登录',
   123→                    '登录/注册'
   124→                ];
   125→                for (const indicator of loginIndicators) {
   126→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   127→                        return { is_login: true, matched: indicator };
   128→                    }
   129→                }
   130→
   131→                // Also check for login form elements in DOM
   132→                const loginForm = document.querySelector(
   133→                    'input[type="tel"], input[placeholder*="手机"], ' +
   134→                    '[class*="qrcode"], [class*="scan-login"], ' +
   135→                    '[class*="login-form"], [class*="sign-form"]'
   136→                );
   137→                if (loginForm) {
   138→                    return { is_login: true, matched: 'login_form_element' };
   139→                }
   140→
   141→                return { is_login: false, matched: null };
   142→            }
   143→        """)
   144→
   145→        if is_login_page.get('is_login', False):
   146→            detail = is_login_page.get('matched', 'unknown')
   147→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=login_page_detected ({detail})")
   148→            return False
   149→
   150→        logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=True, detail=protected_page_accessible (url={final_url})")
   151→        return True
   152→
   153→    except Exception as e:
   154→        logger.error(f"Error checking login status: {e}")
   155→        return False
   156→
   157→
   158→async def ensure_logged_in(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
   159→    """
   160→    Ensure user is logged in, prompting for login if needed.
   161→
   162→    Args:
   163→        browser: Browser manager instance
   164→
   165→    Returns:
   166→        True if logged in (existing or new login)
   167→
   168→    Raises:
   169→        SessionExpiredError: If login fails
   170→    """
   171→    if browser is None:
   172→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   173→
   174→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP if not already connected
   175→    if not browser.is_running:
   176→        await browser.start()
   177→
   178→    # Check login status
   179→    if browser.page:
   180→        if await check_login_status(browser.page):
   181→            return True
   182→
   183→    # Not logged in — guide user
   184→    console.print("[yellow]Not logged in. Please log in to Boss直聘 in your Chrome browser.[/yellow]")
   185→
   186→    if await login(browser):
   187→        return True
   188→
   189→    raise SessionExpiredError("Not logged in to Boss直聘. Please log in manually in Chrome and try again.")
   190→

1→"""Profile extraction module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Extracts detailed candidate profile information from Boss直聘.
     4→Profile details are shown as a floating overlay (浮层) on the search page,
     5→not as a separate page. The extraction JS also supports standalone profile
     6→pages as a fallback.
     7→"""
     8→
     9→from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    10→
    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→from loguru import logger
    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→from rich.panel import Panel
    15→
    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    18→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    19→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    20→from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    21→from src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    22→
    23→console = Console()
    24→
    25→
    26→# JavaScript extraction function for Boss直聘 profile pages
    27→EXTRACT_PROFILE_JS = """
    28→() => {
    29→    const result = {
    30→        name: '',
    31→        title: '',
    32→        company: '',
    33→        location: '',
    34→        salary_expect: '',
    35→        work_years: '',
    36→        education_level: '',
    37→        basic_info: {},
    38→        education: [],
    39→        work_experience: [],
    40→        skills: []
    41→    };
    42→
    43→    // Extract basic info from the profile header area
    44→    const nameEl = document.querySelector(
    45→        '[class*="geek-name"], [class*="name"], h1[class*="name"], .name'
    46→    );
    47→    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    48→
    49→    const titleEl = document.querySelector(
    50→        '[class*="expect-position"], [class*="title"], [class*="position"]'
    51→    );
    52→    result.title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    53→
    54→    const companyEl = document.querySelector(
    55→        '[class*="company-name"], [class*="company"]'
    56→    );
    57→    result.company = companyEl ? companyEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    58→
    59→    const locationEl = document.querySelector(
    60→        '[class*="expect-area"], [class*="location"], [class*="city"]'
    61→    );
    62→    result.location = locationEl ? locationEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63→
    64→    const salaryEl = document.querySelector(
    65→        '[class*="expect-salary"], [class*="salary"]'
    66→    );
    67→    result.salary_expect = salaryEl ? salaryEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    68→
    69→    // Extract info tags (work years, education, age, etc.)
    70→    const tagEls = document.querySelectorAll(
    71→        '[class*="info-tag"], [class*="base-info"] span, [class*="geek-tags"] span, ' +
    72→        '[class*="tag-item"], [class*="basic-info"] span'
    73→    );
    74→    const tags = Array.from(tagEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(t => t);
    75→
    76→    for (const tag of tags) {
    77→        if (tag.includes('年') && (tag.includes('经验') || /^\\d/.test(tag))) {
    78→            result.work_years = tag;
    79→            result.basic_info.work_years = tag;
    80→        } else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => tag.includes(d))) {
    81→            result.education_level = tag;
    82→            result.basic_info.education = tag;
    83→        } else if (tag.includes('岁')) {
    84→            result.basic_info.age = tag;
    85→        } else if (tag.includes('求职') || tag.includes('状态')) {
    86→            result.basic_info.job_status = tag;
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    // Extract education details
    91→    const eduSection = document.querySelector(
    92→        '[class*="resume-education"], [class*="education-list"], [class*="edu-experience"]'
    93→    );
    94→    if (eduSection) {
    95→        const eduItems = eduSection.querySelectorAll(
    96→            '[class*="resume-item"], [class*="edu-item"], [class*="item"], li'
    97→        );
    98→        for (const item of eduItems) {
    99→            const text = item.innerText.trim();
   100→            if (!text) continue;
   101→            const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   102→            const edu = {};
   103→            if (lines.length >= 1) edu.school = lines[0].trim();
   104→            if (lines.length >= 2) edu.degree = lines[1].trim();
   105→            if (lines.length >= 3) edu.major = lines[2].trim();
   106→            if (lines.length >= 4) edu.period = lines[3].trim();
   107→            result.education.push(edu);
   108→        }
   109→    }
   110→
   111→    // Extract work experience
   112→    const workSection = document.querySelector(
   113→        '[class*="resume-work"], [class*="work-list"], [class*="work-experience"]'
   114→    );
   115→    if (workSection) {
   116→        const workItems = workSection.querySelectorAll(
   117→            '[class*="resume-item"], [class*="work-item"], [class*="item"], li'
   118→        );
   119→        for (const item of workItems) {
   120→            const text = item.innerText.trim();
   121→            if (!text) continue;
   122→            const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   123→            const work = {};
   124→            if (lines.length >= 1) work.company = lines[0].trim();
   125→            if (lines.length >= 2) work.title = lines[1].trim();
   126→            if (lines.length >= 3) work.period = lines[2].trim();
   127→            if (lines.length >= 4) work.description = lines.slice(3).join(' ').trim();
   128→            result.work_experience.push(work);
   129→        }
   130→    }
   131→
   132→    // Extract project experience (Boss直聘 specific)
   133→    const projectSection = document.querySelector(
   134→        '[class*="resume-project"], [class*="project-list"]'
   135→    );
   136→    if (projectSection) {
   137→        result.basic_info.has_project = true;
   138→    }
   139→
   140→    // Extract skills
   141→    const skillEls = document.querySelectorAll(
   142→        '[class*="skill-tag"], [class*="skill-item"], [class*="tag-item"], ' +
   143→        '[class*="skill"] span'
   144→    );
   145→    const skills = new Set();
   146→    for (const el of skillEls) {
   147→        const text = el.innerText.trim();
   148→        if (text && text.length < 30) {
   149→            skills.add(text);
   150→        }
   151→    }
   152→    result.skills = Array.from(skills);
   153→
   154→    // Extract advantages/self description
   155→    const advantageEl = document.querySelector(
   156→        '[class*="resume-advantage"], [class*="self-desc"], [class*="geek-advantage"]'
   157→    );
   158→    if (advantageEl) {
   159→        result.basic_info.self_description = advantageEl.innerText.trim();
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    return result;
   163→}
   164→"""
   165→
   166→
   167→async def extract_profile(
   168→    boss_id: str,
   169→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   170→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   171→    """
   172→    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   173→
   174→    Args:
   175→        boss_id: Boss直聘 candidate ID (e.g., "zp_xxx")
   176→        browser: Browser manager instance
   177→
   178→    Returns:
   179→        Dictionary with profile data
   180→
   181→    Raises:
   182→        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   183→    """
   184→    if browser is None:
   185→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   186→
   187→    page = browser.page
   188→    if not page:
   189→        page = await browser.start()
   190→
   191→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   192→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   193→
   194→    # Rate limit check
   195→    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   196→
   197→    # Boss直聘 shows profile as a floating overlay (浮层) on the search page.
   198→    # Strategy 1: Try to extract from an already-open overlay on the current page.
   199→    # Strategy 2: Navigate to profile URL as a fallback.
   200→    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   201→
   202→    # First check if we have a profile URL in the database
   203→    profile_url = None
   204→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   205→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   206→        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   207→            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   208→
   209→    if not profile_url:
   210→        profile_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
   211→
   212→    try:
   213→        # Strategy 1: Check if a profile overlay is already open on the current page
   214→        overlay_present = await page.evaluate("""
   215→            () => {
   216→                const overlay = document.querySelector(
   217→                    '[class*="dialog-wrap"].active, [class*="boss-popup__wrapper"],
   218→                     [class*="geek-detail"], [class*="resume-dialog"], [class*="profile-panel"]'
   219→                );
   220→                return overlay !== null;
   221→            }
   222→        """)
   223→
   224→        if not overlay_present:
   225→            # Strategy 2: Navigate to profile page
